message.content:
You are doing a shallow bug scan of GitHub PR https://github.com/customink/pigment/pull/1139.

PR Summary: Adds MiniProductCard and RecentlyViewedCarousel React components to the `@customink/pigment-extensions/reco` package. New files in packages/extensions/reco/Molecules/MiniProductCard/, packages/extensions/reco/RecentlyViewedWidget/, packages/extensions/reco/hooks/useBreakpoint/, and apps/storybook/stories/extensions/reco/. Also modifies Carousel.tsx, CarouselConstants.ts, ProductsCarousel/utils.ts, and index.ts.

Steps:
1. Fetch the PR diff: `gh pr diff customink/pigment#1139`
2. Read the changes carefully, looking for obvious bugs

Focus ONLY on the changed code. Look for large bugs — logic errors, broken behaviors, incorrect assumptions, missing null checks on things that could be null, etc. Avoid nitpicks, style issues, and things a linter/type-checker would catch.

Return a list of issues, each with:
- File and approximate line
- Description of the bug
- Why it's a bug (not a false positive)

content.text: I'll fetch the PR diff and analyze it for bugs.
